findings.title: Spawns child processes
findings.detail: Spawns child processes in src/daemon.ts. Confirm this is disclosed by the server's tool descriptions.

findings.title: Decoded data flows into code execution
findings.detail: src/generated/agentanycast/v1/a2a_models.ts decodes base64 and appears to execute it — a classic obfuscated-payload pattern.

findings.title: Decoded data flows into code execution
findings.detail: src/generated/agentanycast/v1/streaming.ts decodes base64 and appears to execute it — a classic obfuscated-payload pattern.
